title: Configure overstory runtime capability mapping
description: Add runtime.capabilities to .overstory/config.yaml: coordinator/lead/builder→claude, scout→gemini, reviewer→codex

title: Phase 2 Core Slimming: AI Provider SDK extraction
description: Extract Vercel AI SDK implementations to @linchkit/cap-ai-provider. Core retains AIService interface + noop impl + security layer (AIBoundary, PromptSanitizer, OutputValidator). Prerequisite: add Spec 55 life-system abstractions (Sensor/Signal/Detector/Baseline interfaces) to core first. File areas: packages/core/src/ai/, capabilities/cap-ai-provider/ (new).
closeReason: Merged: AI Provider SDK extracted to cap-ai-provider, core slimmed, Spec 55 life-system types added

title: EventBus field diff enhancement for record.updated
description: Enhance record.updated events to carry changedFields/before/after payload. ExecutionLogEntry.changes already has the data but it is not propagated to EventBus payload. This is a prerequisite for Chatter auto-audit. File areas: packages/core/src/action-engine/, packages/core/src/events/
closeReason: Merged: EventBus field diff with changedFields/before/after payload for record.created/updated/deleted events

title: Fix 3 failing tests + 2 errors in test suite
description: Current test suite: 3003 pass, 3 fail, 2 errors. Identify and fix the 3 failing tests. These may be related to AnomalyDetector or other stale references from core slimming Phase 1.

title: Add OV common commands to Claude Code allowlist
description: Add ov/overstory CLI commands (ov status, ov mail, ov sling, ov merge, ov group, ov nudge, ov worktree, ov metrics, ov run, ov coordinator) to Claude Code settings.json Bash tool allowlist. Check current .claude/settings.json for existing allow patterns and add the missing ov commands.

title: Fix canonicalBranch to feat/m2 + stash-and-merge blocked branches
description: 1. Change .overstory/config.yaml canonicalBranch from 'main' to 'feat/m2'. 2. Run 'git stash' to clear dirty .seeds/issues.jsonl. 3. Merge pending branches in order: builder-test-fix/linchkit-abb1, builder-core-slim/linchkit-2281, builder-cap-ai/linchkit-2281. 4. Run 'git stash pop' after merges.
closeReason: Merged: canonicalBranch fixed to feat/m2, 3 branches merged

title: Diagnose: database not connecting + schemas missing after M2 merges
description: User reports: 1) Database shows 'not connected' in UI admin panel despite DATABASE_URL in .env and PostgreSQL running in Docker. 2) System menus and schemas are missing. Steps: check .env DATABASE_URL value, verify Docker postgres is reachable, run linch dev and capture full console output, check if schemas register properly. May need bun install first for new cap-ai-provider workspace link.

title: Commit cherry-picked allowlist changes + resolve pending merges
description: Cherry-pick of 4ea6780 already applied and staged (.claude/settings.json with ov/sd/ml/mulch allowlist). Just needs: git commit -m 'feat: add ov/sd/ml/mulch to Claude Code allowlist'. Then close linchkit-238a.
closeReason: Committed allowlist changes adding ov/sd/ml/mulch to .claude/settings.json

title: Implement multi-agent review pipeline (Gemini + Codex + Claude)
description: Add automated code review gate before merge_ready. Large changes (>5 files or >200 lines): Claude Code reviewer + Gemini CLI + Codex CLI triple review. Small changes: Gemini + Claude dual review. Modify lead agent-def and/or add OV hooks to invoke gemini/codex CLIs on git diff before merge_ready. Add review results to merge_ready mail.
closeReason: Merged: multi-agent review pipeline (Gemini + Codex dual/triple review gate)

title: Research: Lazy Gate integration with Overstory
description: Investigate Lazy Gate (quality gate / review tool). Research: what is Lazy Gate, what does it do, how could it integrate with the Overstory agent workflow. Evaluate if it can replace or complement the multi-agent review pipeline (Gemini+Codex+Claude). Report findings and feasibility.

title: Research: cap-permission API design for cross-capability usage
description: Permission is now a capability (cap-permission). Other capabilities need to set permissions on their buttons/actions. Research current cap-permission API: How does a capability declare permission requirements for its actions? How does UI read permission state to show/hide buttons? Is the developer experience clear enough? Propose improvements if needed. Check: packages/core/src/types/ for permission types, capabilities/cap-permission/, CommandLayer permission slot.

title: Chatter capability MVP (Spec 53 — message + field change audit)
description: Implement Chatter as a capability (NOT core). Spec 53 MVP scope: 1) Message timeline per record (create/read messages). 2) Auto-audit entries from EventBus record.updated changedFields (now available after EventBus diff merge). 3) GraphQL subscription for real-time updates. 4) Basic UI component (timeline view). File areas: capabilities/cap-chatter/ (new). Depends on: EventBus field diff (merged), GraphQL subscriptions (existing).

title: Table column resizing (TanStack Table)
description: Add column resizing to AutoList table. Use TanStack Table built-in column resizing API (enableColumnResizing, columnResizeMode). Persist widths to localStorage. File areas: capabilities/cap-adapter-ui-react/src/components/auto-list/
closeReason: Added TanStack Table column resizing to AutoList: enableColumnResizing+columnResizeMode=onEnd, resize handle UI in table headers, ColumnSizingState persisted to localStorage keyed by schema name.
